SDK Op activity diagrams (generated)

Generated by cargo xtask gen-flows from crates/sigmakee-rs-sdk/src/<op>.rs. Do not edit.

(result . status , sigmakee_rs_core :: ProverStatus :: Unknown) && ! proved &…"} N27 --> N28 N29(["return"]) N28 -- yes --> N29 N30{"proved == expected"} N28 -- no --> N30 N31{"let Some (expected_answers) = case . expected_answer . clone ()"} N30 -- yes --> N31 N32{"! missing . is_empty ()"} N31 -- yes --> N32 N33(["return"]) N32 -- yes --> N33 N34{"& case_report . outcome"} N32 -- no --> N34 N31 -- no --> N34 N30 -- no --> N34 N35{"let Some (p) = progress . as_deref_mut ()"} N34 -- TestOutcome :: Passed --> N35 N34 -- TestOutcome :: Failed { .. } --> N35 N34 -- TestOutcome :: Incomplete { .. } --> N35 N34 -- TestOutcome :: ParseError (_) --> N35 N34 -- TestOutcome :: SemanticError (_) --> N35 N34 -- TestOutcome :: ProverError (_) --> N35 N34 -- TestOutcome :: NoQuery --> N35 N36{"case_report . outcome"} N35 -- yes --> N36 N35 -- no --> N36 N36 -- TestOutcome :: Passed --> N8 N36 -- TestOutcome :: Failed { .. } | TestOutcome :: Incomplete { .. } | TestOutcome … --> N8 N36 -- TestOutcome :: ParseError (_) | TestOutcome :: SemanticError (_) | TestOutcome… --> N8 N37(["end"]) N8 -- done --> N37
